name: vessica
description: Plan, dispatch, monitor, refine, and review Vessica coding work through the ves CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Drive local and cloud coding factories through ves.
interface.longDescription: Use the ves Go CLI to install engineering harnesses, create epics and tickets, dispatch cloud coding runs, monitor execution, refine previews, and review evidence.
defaultPrompt: Set up Vessica in this repository.
Turn this request into a Vessica epic.
Show me the status of my Vessica runs.
